task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or portal is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the School Information page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The School Information or School Setup page is open, displaying the 'Demo School' record.
The Address field contains the text '456 Oak Avenue'.

task_completion.description: Update the City and State fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The City field contains 'Springfield' and the State field contains 'IL'.
A success message indicating the school information was saved, or the updated information is visible in a non-editable view or after a page reload.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface in a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the OpenSIS application, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual OpenSIS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL in the browser address bar is http://localhost/opensis and the interface matches OpenSIS, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to alter the page content visually
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open in the screenshots to fake the updated values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating the 'Demo School' record in OpenSIS. The expected updated values are: Address: '456 Oak Avenue', City: 'Springfield', State: 'IL', Zip Code: '62704', Phone: '217-555-9876'. The initial values were placeholders like '123 Main St', 'City', 'ST', '12345', and '555-1234'.
